prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Write an XPCOM component header and implementation following Firefox's established patterns. Your component must: 1. Use the `NS_DECL_ISUPPORTS` and `NS_DECL_NSIOBSERVERSERVICE` macros as seen in existing components. 2. Implement `QueryInterface`, `AddRef`, `Release` following the reference counting pattern. 3. Register using `NS_GENERIC_FACTORY_CONSTRUCTOR` as found in existing component registrations under `toolkit/components/`. Write your files to `/workspace/`. Also write `/workspace/answer.json` listing the Firefox source files you referenced.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the mozilla-firefox fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Write an XPCOM component header and implementation following Firefox's established patterns. Your component must: 1. Use the `NS_DECL_ISUPPORTS` and `NS_DECL_NSIOBSERVERSERVICE` macros as seen in existing components. 2. Implement `QueryInterface`, `AddRef`, `Release` following the reference counting pattern. 3. Register using `NS_GENERIC_FACTORY_CONSTRUCTOR` as found in existing component registrations under `toolkit/components/`. Write your files to `/workspace/`. Also write `/workspace/answer.json` listing the Firefox source files you referenced.
